'''''Hurricane''''' was a [[Strike-class medium cruiser|''Strike''-class medium cruiser]] used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. It was sent to investigate a communication array that had been attacked twice. The culprits were revealed to be [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace]] and [[Aeron Azzameen]]; the ''Hurricane'' attempted to stop the two with [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]], but Ace, in his [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300 light freighter]] ''[[Sabra]]'', managed to fend of the ''Hurricane's'' fighters and retreat back to the [[Liberty/Legends|''Liberty'']].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
